# Steward — AI-Powered Price Tracker & Web Monitor

> Steward is an AI-powered app that monitors websites for price drops, restocks, restaurant reservations, campsite openings, flight deals, and event tickets. Available on iOS and web.

## What Steward Does

Steward watches the web for changes that matter to you:

- **Price Drops**: Track prices across Amazon, Nike, Best Buy, Target, Walmart, and thousands of other retailers. Set a target price and get notified the instant it hits.
- **Restaurant Reservations**: Monitor hard-to-get reservations on Resy. Get alerted when cancellations or new slots open up.
- **Campsite Availability**: Watch Recreation.gov for campsite cancellations at Yosemite, Yellowstone, Big Sur, and other national parks.
- **Flight Deals**: Track fares across major airlines and routes. Get pinged when prices drop.
- **Event Tickets**: Watch for face-value ticket drops and restocks on Ticketmaster and other platforms.
- **Product Restocks**: Monitor sold-out products, limited releases, and viral items across most e-commerce sites.

## How It Works

1. Tell Steward what you want by pasting a link, sharing from another app, or describing it in plain English using the AI chat.
2. Steward checks for changes on your schedule (daily to every 2 hours depending on plan).
3. You get a push notification with a direct link to act on it the moment something changes.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Up to 3 watches, daily checks, push notifications. Free forever.
- **Pro ($4.99/month or $39.99/year)**: Up to 7 watches, 12-hour check frequency, price insights and deal alerts.
- **Premium ($9.99/month or $79.99/year)**: Up to 15 watches, 2-hour check frequency, Steward Acts (auto-execute), priority support.

## Key Features

- AI-powered natural language setup (just describe what you want)
- iOS Share Extension (share any link from Safari, Chrome, or any app)
- Works on iPhone and web (joinsteward.app)
- Private and secure, no ads
- Set up in 30 seconds
